summaryAm: ትንሿ ዶሮ አንድ ድምፅ ሲሰማት በመረጋጋት ምን እንደሆነ የምትመረምርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ከመፍራት በፊት መመርመር እና በቀስታ መጠየቅ ጥሩ ነው።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ትንሿ ዶሮ በጓሮ ውስጥ በጠዋት ፀሐይ ቆሎ ትፈልግ ነበር። ጓደኞቿ በአቅራቢያ በሰላም ይጫወቱ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Chicken Little searched for corn in the morning yard.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken Little searching for corn in a sunny yard with friends nearby.

pages.textAm: ከዛፉ ላይ አንድ ትንሽ ፍሬ “ጥፍ!” ብሎ ከእሷ አጠገብ ወደቀ። ትንሿ ዶሮ በድንጋጤ ወደ ላይ ተመለከተች።
pages.textEn: A small fruit fell beside her with a tap.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A small fruit falling near Chicken Little under a friendly tree.

pages.textAm: “ምን ሆነ?” ብላ ተገረመች። ከመሮጥ በፊት ግን አንድ ጥልቅ ትንፋሽ ወሰደች።
pages.textEn: She wondered what happened, then took a deep breath.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken Little pausing and taking a calm breath in the yard.

pages.textAm: እሷ ጓደኞቿን ጠራች። “አንድ ድምፅ ሰማሁ፣ እንድንመረምር ትረዱኛላችሁ?” ብላ በጥሩ ቃል ጠየቀች።
pages.textEn: She asked her friends to help her investigate.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken Little asking animal friends for help in the yard.

pages.textAm: ዳክዬው መሬቱን ተመለከተ፣ ጥንቸሉም በዛፉ በታች ተቀመጠ። ሁሉም በቀስታ ምልክቶቹን መመርመር ጀመሩ።
pages.textEn: Duck and Rabbit looked carefully for clues.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Duck, rabbit, and Chicken Little gently looking for clues near a tree.

pages.textAm: ጉጉት ያለው ወፍ ከቅርንጫፍ ላይ ወደታች ተመለከተ። “ይህ የዛፍ ፍሬ ነው፤ ሰማዩ አልወደቀም” ብሎ በፈገግታ አስረዳ።
pages.textEn: A curious bird explained that the sound came from a fruit.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly bird explaining the fallen fruit to Chicken Little.

pages.textAm: ትንሿ ዶሮ ፍሬውን አንስታ ተመለከተች። “አዎ፣ ትንሽ ፍሬ ነው፤ ትልቅ ጭንቀት አያስፈልግም” አለች።
pages.textEn: Chicken Little looked at the fruit and understood.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken Little holding a small fruit and smiling with relief.

pages.textAm: ጓደኞቿ “መጀመሪያ ቆመን አሰብን፣ ከዚያም ጠየቅን” ብለው ተደሰቱ። በጓሮው ውስጥ ሁሉም በሰላም ተሳቁ።
pages.textEn: Her friends were glad they stopped, thought, and asked.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Animal friends laughing gently together in a sunny yard.

pages.textAm: ትንሿ ዶሮ ከፍሬው ዘር ትንሽ ቦታ ላይ ተከለች። “አንድ ቀን አዲስ ዛፍ ይሆናል” አለች።
pages.textEn: Chicken Little planted the fruit seed for a future tree.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken Little planting a tiny seed with friends watching.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ ድምፅ ሲሰሙ መጀመሪያ ይቆማሉ፣ ይተነፍሳሉ፣ ከዚያም ይመረምራሉ። ትንሿ ዶሮም በቀስታ መጠየቅ ጥበብ እንደሆነ ተማረች።
pages.textEn: From then on, they paused, breathed, and checked before worrying.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Chicken Little and friends calmly exploring the yard together.
